description_long: This object consists of two large, glossy capsules, each with a distinct color split along the middle. One capsule is half blue and half white, while the other is half red and half white. Both capsules have a smooth, seamless surface with rounded ends and a slight sheen, indicating a hard gelatin or plastic exterior. The capsules are positioned side by side, with their colored halves facing outward, making the color contrast visually prominent. There are no visible markings, text, or logos on the surface of either capsule. The overall appearance suggests these are oversized representations of common pharmaceutical capsules, typically used for oral medication.
description: Two large, glossy capsules—one blue and white, the other red and white—are shown side by side with smooth, rounded surfaces and no visible markings.
description_view_0: The blue and white capsule is in the foreground, with its blue half most visible, while the red and white capsule is behind, showing mostly its white half.
description_view_1: The red and white capsule is now in the foreground, with its red half most visible, and the blue and white capsule is behind, showing mostly its blue half.
description_view_2: The red half of the red and white capsule is most prominent, with the blue and white capsule in the background, showing its white half.
description_view_3: The blue half of the blue and white capsule and the red half of the red and white capsule are both visible, emphasizing the color contrast.
